name: App Infrastructure & Logging
description: Handles application startup, crash/hang logging, system tray icon with notification badge counter, balloon notifications, structured app logging with rotation, safe background file writes, and global constants.

patterns: Global constants class for magic numbers and model IDs
Queue-based background log writing with drain-on-shutdown
Size-capped log file with in-memory ring buffer
